name: na-airtable
description: Read, create, update, and delete Airtable records.

name: na-csv
description: Read and write CSV files with configurable delimiter, headers, and encoding.

name: na-db
description: Execute SQL queries against PostgreSQL databases.

name: na-db-mysql
description: Execute SQL queries against MySQL databases.

name: na-db-postgres
description: Execute SQL queries against PostgreSQL databases.

name: na-db-sqlite
description: Execute SQL queries against SQLite databases.

name: na-discord
description: Send messages to Discord via webhook or bot token.

name: na-echo
description: Echoes the input `message` field back as `echo`.

name: na-email
description: Sends an email via SMTP.

name: na-excel
description: Read and write Excel (.xlsx) files with sheet and range selection.

name: na-file
description: Read from or write to local files.

name: na-fixedwidth
description: Read and write fixed-width text files with configurable column definitions.

name: na-google-sheets
description: Read from and append to Google Sheets using service account auth.

name: na-html
description: Extract data from HTML documents using CSS selectors. Supports table extraction and arbitrary selector queries.

name: na-http
description: Make HTTP requests (GET / POST / PUT / DELETE / PATCH).

name: na-jq
description: Extract a value from JSON via dot-path syntax (e.g. rows.0.name).

name: na-json
description: Read, write, and transform JSON documents.

name: na-jsonpath
description: Extract / transform JSON via jq-compatible filters (.[] | {id, name}, .[0:5], etc.)

name: na-llm
description: LLM chat completions via OpenAI / Anthropic compatible API.

name: na-notion
description: Query Notion databases, create/update pages, append blocks.

name: na-parquet
description: Read Apache Parquet files. Streaming read emits one NDJSON row per line.

name: na-s3
description: S3-compatible object storage: read, write, list, delete objects.

name: na-schedule
description: Cron-like timer that executes a flow on a schedule.

name: na-slack
description: Slack messaging node: post messages and read channel history.

name: na-stripe
description: Stripe API node: list, create, and manage payments and customers.

name: na-telegram
description: Telegram Bot node: send messages and get updates.

name: na-twilio
description: Send SMS and WhatsApp messages via Twilio API.

name: na-vault
description: Structured credential store with at-rest encryption. Resolves vault:// refs, manages credential CRUD.

name: na-webhook
description: HTTP server that executes a flow on each POST request.

name: na-xml
description: Parse XML documents into JSON or generate XML from JSON.

name: na-yaml
description: Parse YAML documents into JSON and serialize JSON to YAML.

name: na-zip
description: Compress and decompress archives (zip, gzip).
